text: 5. The Subcontractor shall furnish and install all unit bathroom vanity sinks. Vanity sinks shall be GS-W021 White Porcelain undermount sinks. The Subcontractor shall drill vanity sink faucet and valve holes. The Subcontractor shall also provide an eased-edge, polished, finish sink opening and confirm with the plumbing subcontractor that the drainpipe connections will fit properly to the sink prior to sink installation. The sink shall be installed with clips as per best industry practices. The Subcontractor shall provide all cutout information for the sinks to the Contractor.
